sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE, value NUMERIC, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date, value, description) VALUES (1, '2023-02-29', 100.0, 'Leap year test'), (2, '2023-01-01', NULL, 'New Year'), (3, '2023-12-31', -50.0, 'Boundary values');
SELECT id, isodow(event_date) AS iso_weekday, value FROM test_dates WHERE isodow(event_date) IS NOT NULL AND value >= 0 ORDER BY iso_weekday;
SELECT t1.id, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM test_dates t1 JOIN test_dates t2 ON t1.value - t2.value >= 0 GROUP BY t1.id HAVING isodow(t2.event_date) <= 5;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE isodow(event_date) = 7) - INTERVAL 1 DAY AS adjusted_count;
SELECT id, (event_date - INTERVAL (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL) DAY) AS adjusted_date FROM test_dates WHERE description IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, event_date - INTERVAL 1 MONTH AS previous_month FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > '2023-02-01';

SELECT t.id, isodow(t.event_date) AS weekday, (t.event_date - INTERVAL 5 DAY) AS past_date FROM test_dates t WHERE isodow(t.event_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 7 AND past_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY weekday DESC;
